title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
